name: freehand_phrase
spl2: search "connection refused"
lynxflow: from main "connection refused"
notes: Quoted phrase desugars to contains(_raw, ...) per RFC-002 D16; free-hand scope visible in meta.rewrites.

name: search_and_terms
spl2: | search "payment" AND "failed" | stats count
lynxflow: | where has(_raw, "payment") and has(_raw, "failed") | stats count()
notes: Mid-pipeline search command is killed (D15); single-token quoted terms map to has().

name: search_or_phrases
spl2: | search "SQL injection" OR "Path traversal" | stats count
lynxflow: | where contains(_raw, "SQL injection") or contains(_raw, "Path traversal") | stats count()
notes: Multi-token phrases map to contains() (case-insensitive), not has().

name: where_eq
spl2: | where status=500 | stats count
lynxflow: | where status == 500 | stats count()
notes: == compares, = binds (D8); count() requires parens (D28).

name: where_parens_complex
spl2: | where (level="ERROR" AND status=500) OR (level="WARN" AND threat_type="sqli") | stats count
lynxflow: | where (level == "ERROR" and status == 500) or (level == "WARN" and threat_type == "sqli") | stats count()

name: where_in
spl2: | where level IN ("ERROR", "WARN") | stats count
lynxflow: | where level in ["ERROR", "WARN"] | stats count()
notes: IN lists become array literals.

name: where_between
spl2: | where duration_ms between 20 and 6000 | stats count, avg(duration_ms) as avg_dur, min(duration_ms) as min_dur, max(duration_ms) as max_dur
lynxflow: | where duration_ms between 20 and 6000 | stats count(), avg(duration_ms) as avg_dur, min(duration_ms) as min_dur, max(duration_ms) as max_dur

name: where_like_prefix
spl2: | where path LIKE "/api/v2/users%" | stats count
lynxflow: | where starts_with(path, "/api/v2/users") | stats count()
notes: LIKE is dropped (D4); prefix pattern maps to starts_with.

name: stats_multi_agg
spl2: | stats avg(duration_ms), max(duration_ms), min(duration_ms)
lynxflow: | stats avg(duration_ms), max(duration_ms), min(duration_ms)

name: stats_by_multi
spl2: | stats count by level, service | sort level, service
lynxflow: | stats count() by level, service | sort level, service

name: agg_conditional
spl2: | stats count(eval(status>=500)) as errors, count(eval(status<400)) as success, count as total
lynxflow: | stats count(where status >= 500) as errors, count(where status < 400) as success, count() as total
notes: count(eval(p)) becomes count(where p).

name: error_rate
spl2: | stats count as total, count(eval(level="ERROR")) as errors | eval error_pct=round(errors*100/total, 1) | fields total, errors, error_pct
lynxflow: | stats count() as total, count(where level == "ERROR") as errors | extend error_pct = round(errors * 100.0 / total, 1) | keep total, errors, error_pct
notes: 100.0 forces float arithmetic: int/int is integer division in v2 (D26).

name: agg_dc
spl2: | stats dc(service) as unique_services
lynxflow: | stats dc(service) as unique_services

name: agg_stdev
spl2: | stats stdev(duration_ms) as sd, avg(duration_ms) as mean
lynxflow: | stats stdev(duration_ms) as sd, avg(duration_ms) as mean

name: agg_percentiles
spl2: | stats perc50(duration_ms) as p50, perc90(duration_ms) as p90, perc99(duration_ms) as p99, avg(duration_ms) as avg_dur
lynxflow: | stats p50(duration_ms) as p50, p90(duration_ms) as p90, p99(duration_ms) as p99, avg(duration_ms) as avg_dur
notes: percN aliases replace the percentile zoo.

name: agg_earliest_latest
spl2: | stats earliest(level) as first_level, latest(level) as last_level by service | sort service
lynxflow: | stats earliest(level) as first_level, latest(level) as last_level by service | sort service

name: eval_arithmetic
spl2: | where amount_cents>0 | eval amount_usd=round(amount_cents/100, 2) | fields amount_usd, service | sort amount_usd
lynxflow: | where amount_cents > 0 | extend amount_usd = round(amount_cents / 100.0, 2) | keep amount_usd, service | sort amount_usd
notes: eval becomes extend; 100.0 forces float division (D26).

name: eval_case
spl2: | eval severity=case(level="ERROR","critical",level="WARN","warning",1=1,"normal") | stats count by severity | sort severity
lynxflow: | extend severity = case(level == "ERROR", "critical", level == "WARN", "warning", "normal") | stats count() by severity | sort severity
notes: The 1=1 default idiom becomes a trailing default argument.

name: eval_coalesce
spl2: | eval err=error ?? "none" | eval amt=amount_cents ?? 0 | stats count by err | sort err
lynxflow: | extend err = error ?? "none", amt = amount_cents ?? 0 | stats count() by err | sort err
notes: ?? recovers both null and missing.

name: eval_substr
spl2: | eval path_prefix=substr(path, 1, 7) | dedup path_prefix | fields path_prefix | sort path_prefix
lynxflow: | extend path_prefix = substr(path, 0, 7) | dedup path_prefix | keep path_prefix | sort path_prefix
notes: substr is 0-based in v2 (RFC-001 was 1-based).

name: eval_fstring
spl2: | eval label=f"{level}:{service}" | stats count by label | sort label
lynxflow: | extend label = level + ":" + service | stats count() by label | sort label
notes: F-strings are removed (D19); + concatenates strings.

name: eval_regex_match
spl2: | eval is_api=if(match(path, "^/api/"), "yes", "no") | stats count by is_api | sort is_api
lynxflow: | extend is_api = if(matches(path, r"^/api/"), "yes", "no") | stats count() by is_api | sort is_api
notes: match becomes matches with a raw-string pattern.

name: eval_cidrmatch
spl2: | eval is_internal=if(cidrmatch("10.0.0.0/8", client_ip), "yes", "no") | stats count by is_internal
lynxflow: | extend is_internal = if(cidr_match("10.0.0.0/8", client_ip), "yes", "no") | stats count() by is_internal

name: eval_startswith_contains
spl2: | eval is_api=if(startswith(path, "/api"), "yes", "no") | eval is_v2=if(contains(path, "/v2/"), "yes", "no") | stats count by is_api, is_v2 | sort is_api, is_v2
lynxflow: | extend is_api = if(starts_with(path, "/api"), "yes", "no"), is_v2 = if(contains(path, "/v2/"), "yes", "no") | stats count() by is_api, is_v2 | sort is_api, is_v2
notes: v2 contains is case-insensitive by default (D12); RFC-001 contains was case-sensitive.

name: eval_exists
spl2: | eval has_error=if(isnotnull(error), "yes", "no") | eval has_amount=if(isnotnull(amount_cents), "yes", "no") | stats count by has_error, has_amount | sort has_error, has_amount
lynxflow: | extend has_error = if(exists(error), "yes", "no"), has_amount = if(exists(amount_cents), "yes", "no") | stats count() by has_error, has_amount | sort has_error, has_amount
notes: isnotnull becomes exists; the null/missing/error trichotomy adds is_null and is_missing.

name: fillnull
spl2: | fillnull value="N/A" error, threat_type | where error!="N/A" | stats count by error | sort error
lynxflow: | extend error = error ?? "N/A", threat_type = threat_type ?? "N/A" | where error != "N/A" | stats count() by error | sort error
notes: fillnull is killed; ?? covers it.

name: fields_exclude
spl2: | fields - trace_id, span_id, instance, memory_mb, cpu_pct | table level, service, method, path, status, duration_ms, message, timestamp | head 3 | sort timestamp
lynxflow: | drop trace_id, span_id, instance, memory_mb, cpu_pct | keep level, service, method, path, status, duration_ms, message, timestamp | head 3 | sort timestamp

name: rename
spl2: | rename service AS svc, level AS severity | stats count by severity, svc | sort severity, svc | head 5
lynxflow: | rename service as svc, level as severity | stats count() by severity, svc | sort severity, svc | head 5

name: dedup_multi
spl2: | dedup 2 level | fields level, service | sort level, service
lynxflow: | dedup 2 level | keep level, service | sort level, service

name: sort_mixed_head
spl2: | stats count by level, service | sort level, -count, service | head 10
lynxflow: | stats count() by level, service | sort level, -count, service | head 10
notes: Prefix sort form is the only form (D22).

name: top3
spl2: | top 3 service
lynxflow: | top 3 service
notes: Sugar: stats count() as count by service | sort -count | head 3.

name: rare3
spl2: | rare 3 service
lynxflow: | rare 3 service

name: timechart_every
spl2: | timechart count span=1h by level
lynxflow: | every 1h by level stats count()
notes: timechart is killed; every desugars to stats ... by level, bin(_time, 1h).

name: bin_error_rate
spl2: | bin timestamp span=30m as bucket | stats count as total, count(eval(level="ERROR")) as errors by bucket | eval error_pct=round(errors*100/total, 1) | sort bucket
lynxflow: | extend bucket = bin(timestamp, 30m) | stats count() as total, count(where level == "ERROR") as errors by bucket | extend error_pct = round(errors * 100.0 / total, 1) | sort bucket
notes: bin command becomes the bin() function in an extend (or directly in a stats by-list).

name: xyseries_pivot
spl2: | stats count by service, level | xyseries service level count | sort service
lynxflow: | stats count() by service, level | xyseries service level count | sort service

name: eventstats_global
spl2: | eventstats avg(duration_ms) as global_avg | where duration_ms > global_avg * 2 | fields service, duration_ms, global_avg
lynxflow: | eventstats avg(duration_ms) as global_avg | where duration_ms > global_avg * 2 | keep service, duration_ms, global_avg

name: eventstats_deviation
spl2: | enrich avg(duration_ms) as svc_avg by service | let deviation = duration_ms - svc_avg | where deviation > 0 | fields service, duration_ms, svc_avg, deviation | sort -deviation | head 5
lynxflow: | eventstats avg(duration_ms) as svc_avg by service | extend deviation = duration_ms - svc_avg | where deviation > 0 | keep service, duration_ms, svc_avg, deviation | sort -deviation | head 5
notes: enrich alias is killed; pipeline let is killed (D21).

name: sugar_chain_pct
spl2: | group by service compute count() as hits | enrich sum(hits) as total | let pct = round(hits * 100 / total, 1) | select service, hits, pct | order by -pct
lynxflow: | stats count() as hits by service | eventstats sum(hits) as total | extend pct = round(hits * 100.0 / total, 1) | keep service, hits, pct | sort -pct
notes: group/compute, enrich, let, select, order by all map to core stages.

name: streamstats_window
spl2: | sort timestamp | running window=3 avg(duration_ms) as rolling_avg | fields service, duration_ms, rolling_avg | head 6
lynxflow: | sort timestamp | streamstats window=3 avg(duration_ms) as rolling_avg | keep service, duration_ms, rolling_avg | head 6
notes: running alias is killed.

name: streamstats_cumulative
spl2: | sort timestamp | streamstats sum(duration_ms) as cumulative_dur | fields timestamp, service, duration_ms, cumulative_dur | tail 5
lynxflow: | sort timestamp | streamstats sum(duration_ms) as cumulative_dur | keep timestamp, service, duration_ms, cumulative_dur | tail 5

name: cte_single
spl2: $errs = | where level="ERROR"; FROM $errs | eval is_50x=if(status>=500,"yes","no") | stats count by is_50x | sort is_50x
lynxflow: let $errs = from main | where level == "ERROR"; from $errs | extend is_50x = if(status >= 500, "yes", "no") | stats count() by is_50x | sort is_50x
notes: CTEs require the let keyword (D21); implicit sources become explicit in CTE bodies.

name: cte_chained
spl2: $base = | where service="payment-service"; $pay_errs = FROM $base | where status=500; FROM $pay_errs | stats count, sum(amount_cents) as total
lynxflow: let $base = from main | where service == "payment-service"; let $pay_errs = from $base | where status == 500; from $pay_errs | stats count(), sum(amount_cents) as total

name: append_union
spl2: | where level="ERROR" | stats count as n | append [| where level="WARN" | stats count as n] | sort n
lynxflow: | where level == "ERROR" | stats count() as n | union [from main | where level == "WARN" | stats count() as n] | sort n
notes: append and multisearch are killed; union covers both.

name: transaction_maxspan
spl2: | transaction user_id maxspan=30m | fields user_id, duration, eventcount | sort user_id
lynxflow: | transaction user_id maxspan=30m | keep user_id, duration, eventcount | sort user_id

name: compare_previous
spl2: | compare previous -1h | head 5
lynxflow: | compare previous 1h | head 5
notes: compare takes a positive duration in v2.

name: errors_sugar_killed
spl2: | errors by service
lynxflow: | where lower(level) in ["error", "fatal"] | stats count() by service
notes: The errors shortcut is killed; its conservative predicate is written out.

name: latency_sugar
spl2: | latency duration_ms every 1h by service
lynxflow: | latency duration_ms every 1h by service
notes: Sugar kept: stats p50/p95/p99/count by service, bin(_time, 1h).

name: rate_sugar
spl2: | rate per 1h by level
lynxflow: | rate per 1h by level

name: percentiles_sugar
spl2: | percentiles duration_ms by service | sort service
lynxflow: | percentiles duration_ms by service | sort service

name: slowest_killed
spl2: | slowest 5 duration_ms by service
lynxflow: | stats max(duration_ms) as max_duration_ms by service | sort -max_duration_ms | head 5
notes: slowest/rank/topby/bottomby are killed; the expansion is the query.

name: describe
spl2: FROM backend | glimpse
lynxflow: from backend | describe
notes: glimpse and fieldsummary are replaced by describe.

name: materialize_mv
spl2: level=error | stats count, avg(duration) by source, time_bucket(timestamp, '5m') AS bucket | materialize "mv_errors_5m" retention=90d
lynxflow: from main level=error | stats count(), avg(duration) by source, bin(_time, 5m) | materialize "mv_errors_5m" retention=90d
notes: time_bucket becomes bin; the binned key emits as _time.

name: join_cte_cross_index
notes: v2 join requires matching key names, hence the explicit rename of src_ip.

name: parse_explode_nested
spl2: | parse docker(_raw) | parse json(message) | explode errors | group by errors.code, errors.service compute count() as cnt
lynxflow: | parse docker | parse json from message | explode errors | stats count() as cnt by errors.code, errors.service
notes: Paren parse forms become parse <format> [from <field>]; errors.code is object access on the exploded element.

name: sigma_simple_eq
spl2: FROM main | search CommandLine="whoami"
lynxflow: from main CommandLine="whoami"
notes: Key:value sugar desugars to where CommandLine == "whoami".

name: sigma_and_or_not
spl2: FROM main | search (FieldA="val1" AND NOT FieldB="val2") OR FieldC="val3"
lynxflow: from main (FieldA="val1" and not FieldB="val2") or FieldC="val3"
notes: Standard precedence everywhere; the original is fully parenthesized so meaning is preserved.

name: sigma_brute_force
spl2: FROM main | search (EventID=4625 AND NOT SubStatus="0xC0000064")
lynxflow: from main EventID=4625 and not SubStatus="0xC0000064"

name: sigma_numeric_compare
spl2: FROM main | search (status>=400 AND status<500)
lynxflow: from main status>=400 and status<500

name: sigma_keywords
spl2: FROM main | search "error" OR "timeout" OR "refused"
lynxflow: from main error or timeout or refused
notes: Single-token keywords are bare terms backed by the term index.

name: sigma_wildcards
spl2: FROM main | search (CommandLine=*"whoami"* AND Image=*".exe" AND ParentImage="C:\\Windows"*)
lynxflow: from main | where contains(CommandLine, "whoami") and ends_with(Image, ".exe") and starts_with(ParentImage, "C:\\Windows")
notes: Substring wildcard maps to contains (CI, matching SEARCH-context semantics); prefix/suffix map to starts_with/ends_with (CS) - the rsigma emitter must decide per-rule case handling in Phase 9.

name: sigma_exists_bool
spl2: FROM main | search (FieldA=* AND NOT FieldB=* AND Enabled=true)
lynxflow: from main | where exists(FieldA) and not exists(FieldB) and Enabled == true
notes: field=* existence tests become exists().

name: sigma_cidr
spl2: FROM main | search * | where cidrmatch("10.0.0.0/8", SourceIP)
lynxflow: from main | where cidr_match("10.0.0.0/8", SourceIP)
notes: search * (match-all) is implicit in from.

name: sigma_regex
spl2: FROM main | search * | where CommandLine =~ ".*whoami.*"
lynxflow: from main | where matches(CommandLine, r".*whoami.*")
notes: =~ is killed; matches with a raw-string pattern.
